allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('source:', r['source']\); print\('primaryIndex:', r['primaryMeaningIndex']\); m=r['meanings'][r['primaryMeaningIndex']] if r['meanings'] else None; print\('primary POS:', m['partOfSpeech'] if m else 'none'\); print\('primary def:', m['definitionEn'] if m else 'none'\); print\('all POS:', [x['partOfSpeech'] for x in r['meanings']]\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('/tmp/t1.json'\); console.log\('source:',r.source\); console.log\('primaryIndex:',r.primaryMeaningIndex\); console.log\('primary POS:',r.meanings[r.primaryMeaningIndex]?.partOfSpeech\); console.log\('primary def:',r.meanings[r.primaryMeaningIndex]?.definitionEn\); console.log\('primary tr:',r.meanings[r.primaryMeaningIndex]?.definitionTr\); console.log\('all POS:',r.meanings.map\(m=>m.partOfSpeech\)\)")
